name: Pawn Max
description_short: Pawn Max (Store 3) is a pawn shop selling pre-owned jewelry, electronics, tools, and more online, with a layaway plan up to 12 months.
description_long:
Pawn Max Store 3 operates under the 866pawn.com network, indicating it is part of a multi-location pawn chain accessible via a toll-free number. The store maintains an e-commerce presence at pm3.866pawn.com, allowing customers to browse and purchase inventory online in addition to any in-store transactions. The website design was handled by Ventura Web Design & Marketing, suggesting a regional or franchise-style operation with professional web support.

The store sells pre-owned and pawned merchandise across eight product categories: Jewelry & Watches, Tools, Small Appliances, Sporting Goods, Musical Instruments, Electronics, Clothing, and a general catch-all category. Featured inventory at time of review included a 14K white gold diamond ring ($999.99), a Breitling Galactic women's automatic watch ($3,499.99), a Mantis shooting scope ($124.99), and a 2012 Apple MacBook Air ($119.98). This range reflects both high-value luxury resale and everyday consumer electronics.

Pawn Max Store 3 distinguishes itself with an in-house layaway program: customers can put 10% down on any purchase, make payments for up to 12 months, and pay no layaway fees. This is a meaningful feature for buyers who want higher-ticket items — like watches or jewelry — but cannot pay upfront. The store also offers free standard shipping on orders over $50, excluding freight items and deliveries to Hawaii and Alaska, making online purchasing reasonably accessible for most continental US customers.

As a pawn-model resale store, pricing is typically below retail, but buyers should verify item condition carefully since inventory is pre-owned and descriptions online are limited. The website provides no published information on pawn loan terms, interest rates, or the process for bringing items in to pawn — those details would require direct contact with the store. Consumers looking purely for cash-backed loans should confirm lending services are available at their specific location before visiting.
pros: Layaway plan available with no fees and up to 12 months to pay
Low 10% down payment to start a layaway
Free shipping on orders over $50 to continental US
Wide product range: jewelry, electronics, tools, sporting goods, musical instruments, clothing
High-value luxury inventory available (Breitling watches, gold diamond rings) at below-MSRP prices
Online storefront allows browsing and purchasing without visiting a physical location
Part of the 866pawn.com chain, suggesting established multi-location operations
cons: No published pawn loan terms, interest rates, or APR on the website
Shipping excluded for Hawaii and Alaska customers, and freight items not eligible
Inventory is pre-owned — condition details for individual items are not clearly described on the site
Website represents 'Store 3' only; services and inventory may differ across locations
No visible customer reviews, return policy, or warranty information on the site
best_for: Budget shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned electronics, tools, or luxury goods
Consumers who need a no-fee layaway plan to afford higher-ticket items over time
Buyers looking for pre-owned jewelry or watches at below-retail prices
Individuals in the store's service area who want to pawn or sell personal property for quick cash
diagnosis: Pawn Max Store 3 is best suited for deal-seekers who want affordable pre-owned goods — especially jewelry, watches, or electronics — and benefit from the no-fee layaway option to spread out payments. The main caveat is that pawn loan terms and rates are not disclosed on the website, so consumers seeking collateral-based cash loans should contact the store directly to confirm availability and costs before making the trip.
services: Used tools and small appliances for sale
Sporting goods and musical instruments resale
No-fee layaway financing (up to 12 months, 10% down)
Free shipping on qualifying orders over $50
